mapper.select: SELECT pr.id, pr.user_id, u.username, u.avatar, pr.rating, pr.content, pr.created_at, pr.review_images FROM product_review pr LEFT JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE pr.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT image_url FROM review_image WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT pr.id, pr.user_id as user_id, u.username, u.avatar as avatar, pr.rating, pr.content, pr.created_at as created_at, pr.review_images as review_images, p.title as productTitle, pi.url as productMainImage FROM product_review pr LEFT JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN product p ON pr.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN product_image pi ON p.id = pi.product_id AND pi.image_type = 0
AND (pr.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND pr.rating = #{rating}
ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
